summary: Grounded 5 scenes. Growth: 70.1% (2168 → 3689). Key enrichments: Named King's Road, Eastweald, Darrowshire crossroads, Scholomance basin. Enriched Lor'themar relay with Convocation politics (Rommath, Saltheril, Runestones, Eversong border). Enriched Antonidas call with Violet Citadel, Council of Six, mithril filigree sending stone, restricted archives flashback. Enriched courier with First Legion, Silver Hand cavalry, Uther the Lightbringer, Captain Falric. Enriched Stratholme planning with architectural map, royal granaries, guild bakehouses, arcane frost/evocation fire specifics. All proper nouns sourced from materials.
